## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Call endpoint '...' with payload '...'
2. Authenticated as role '...'
3. See error / unexpected response

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include the full response body / stack trace if available.

## Environment
- Java version:
- PostgreSQL version:
- Deployment (local / Docker / Render / other):
- Backend commit/version:

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here.
